text: Perplexity is derived from held-out loss and is commonly used to measure next-token prediction quality for continued pretraining.
Model cards should record the evaluated model URI, the inference endpoint, and the benchmark results used to generate the scorecard.
A local single-model evaluation can start a FastAPI inference server, query it with a golden set, and write scorecard plus model-card artifacts to disk.
Object storage is necessary because evaluation artifacts and training summaries are larger and more durable than inline pipeline parameters.
